adminSignupNotice: Admin accounts are not created from this form. If you need admin access, use a provisioned account and sign in.
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your account email and we'll send reset instructions.
forgotPasswordError: Could not request a password reset. Please try again.
forgotPasswordSubmittedDescription: If an account exists for {{email}}, reset instructions will arrive there shortly.
heroDescription: Master Discrete Mathematics through spaced repetition and personalized learning paths. Track your progress and achieve your goals.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
learnerSignupDescription: Create a learner account and start your LearnLab path.
learnerSignupOnly: This form creates learner accounts only.
loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
loginFlowDescription: Sign in with your LearnLab account and we'll route you by role.
registrationFailed: Registration failed. Please review your details and try again.
registrationSuccessLogin: Account created successfully! Sign in with your new credentials below.
resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your LearnLab account.
resetPasswordError: Could not reset your password. Please request a new link and try again.
resetPasswordInvalidLink: This reset link is missing required credentials. Please request a new password reset email.
resetPasswordSuccessDescription: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with the new password.
serverUnreachable: Cannot reach the server. Please try again later.
usernameHelper: Pick a unique public handle for your account.
